## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (build + unit tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` output (`dist/`) is committed if source changed
- [ ] Tested on a phone-sized viewport (the app is mobile-first)
- [ ] Scoring/payout changes include a test in `tests/`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data added to the repo
